image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Could crayfish feel anxiety? New studies say yes.
Context visual: Researchers found crayfish showing signs of anxiety-like behavior when stressed.
Escalation visual: They responded to anti-anxiety drugs, similar to how humans do.
Evidence visual: But remember, this research is preliminary and still needs careful interpretation.
Payoff visual: Understanding these behaviors helps us learn about the emotional lives of animals.
Cta visual: What do you think? Can crayfish really feel anxiety? Comment below!
